markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on pipeline, client handoffs, and critical year-end renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**HubSpot is the new source of truth.** All ICP scoring will now live in HubSpot, replacing ad hoc Notion docs. This centralizes data, improves pipeline clarity, and enables future integrations with PM tools.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Pipeline is strong for Q1, but coverage is light.** The pipeline has \~28 high/medium priority deals, but the true coverage is obscured by \~63 low-priority or re-engageable deals. Tyler will clean up the pipeline to show an accurate forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**Kickoff capacity will increase to 3/week by April.** The team will scale from 2 to 3 kickoffs per week, starting with a gradual ramp-up in March. This is deemed feasible with the current team, improved processes, and standardized workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Two critical renewals require immediate action.** ReadAI's conversion depends on a CEO meeting on Monday, while Vizcom's is at risk due to zero published content. Tyler will backchannel with Vizcom's CMO to address the risk.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot as Source of Truth

  - [HubSpot will now be the single source of truth for all sales and client data, replacing ad hoc Notion docs.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**ICP Scoring:** All scores will be logged in the "Sales Qualification" tab on deal records.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Access:** The team will gain access via shared licenses or aliases.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**Integration:** A tool is being explored to pull HubSpot data into PM platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Pipeline Cleanup:** Tyler will close-lost many of the \~63 low-priority/re-engageable deals to provide an accurate forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Low-priority deals (e.g., VCluster, Strive Health) have low ICP scores or don't fit the core editorial service.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

### Kickoff Capacity & Pipeline Strategy

  - [**Capacity Goal:** Scale to 3 kickoffs per week by April.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Jan:** 2/week](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Feb:** 2/week](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [**Mar:** Gradual ramp-up (some 3-kickoff weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Feasibility:** The current team is equipped to handle the increase, supported by:](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [2 Engagement Managers (vs. 1 previously)](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Hassan's support](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Standardized workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Pipeline Strategy:** Prioritize client success over logo value.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Build a portfolio of "easy wins" (e.g., Turnstile) to generate strong case studies, which are more valuable than difficult engagements with big logos (e.g., Sanity).](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Critical Year-End Conversions

  - [**ReadAI:** Conversion depends on a CEO meeting on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Blocker:** The primary stakeholder, Sarah, cannot make the decision alone.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Action:** Ada will backchannel with Sarah to prep for the CEO meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Vizcom:** Conversion is at risk ("yellow" status) due to zero published content.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Context:** Articles are staged but blocked by the client's website QA.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Action:** Tyler will backchannel with CMO Emily to confirm commitment and address the publication gap.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [**Airby:** $10k upsell confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Client Handoffs

  - [**Jan 5 Kickoffs:** CRV & Panther](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Jan 12 Kickoffs:** NetRix & Tala Era](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [**Handoff Meetings:** George, William, and Kathy will attend the first few handoffs.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Allows William and Kathy to shadow and align on client assignments based on interest and expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [**Action:** Tyler will schedule the CRV/Panther handoff for tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Okta/Auth0 Renewal Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current engagement, focused on sales content, is not a long-term fit and is paused. The contract renews in March.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [**Goal:** Secure a renewal by pitching a net new engagement to the marketing org.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
    1.  [**Andi:** Post in the Okta Slack channel to coordinate with Kyle and Eric.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
    2.  [**Kyle:** Request an intro from the current contact (who is leaving) to the correct decision-maker in the marketing org ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
    3.  [**Tyler:** Lead the new sales process once the introduction is made.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Schedule the CRV/Panther handoff meeting for tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Backchannel with Vizcom's CMO to address the publication gap.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [Clean up the HubSpot pipeline by closing-lost low-priority deals.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
      - [Post in the Okta Slack channel to coordinate the renewal strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [Request an intro from the current Okta contact to the marketing org decision-maker.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Ada:**](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Backchannel with ReadAI's Sarah to prep for the CEO meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/uxgmAM8bEBzZV3jY-tTW3sYUqt34tgre?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
